response.justification: Bogdan has strong C++ experience (3+ years) and extensive software development background, but lacks the required 8 years of C++ specifically. His leadership experience is primarily in staff/contributor roles rather than formal technical leadership. His cloud infrastructure experience is limited to Kubernetes and AWS CDK, with no direct mention of large-scale distributed systems or hardware architecture. His diverse stack expertise is a plus, but alignment with core responsibilities is weak.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (3+ years) with contributions to low-latency systems (DLang/C++)
Proven leadership in staff/contributor roles and mentoring (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course)
Experience with large-scale systems (micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (3+ years vs. required 8 years)
Limited direct cloud infrastructure experience (no compute/storage/hardware architecture)
Lacks formal technical leadership experience (e.g., leading projects, managing deadlines)
